{"roles":[{"name":"旁白","description":"叙述者，负责环境描述和叙述","suggested_voice":"逗阿生-解说beta.wav"},{"name":"战彦寒","description":"男主，冷峻强势，后期流露复杂与心疼","suggested_voice":"云浩宇（影视模式.wav"},{"name":"西西","description":"猫变成人的主角，脆弱委屈，带有本能猫性","suggested_voice":"云小馨（影视模式）.wav"},{"name":"夏辛","description":"战彦寒身边的人，说话直接，略碎碎念","suggested_voice":"逗明轩‌.wav"},{"name":"兽医","description":"负责检查西西伤情的专业人士","suggested_voice":"故事-逗叔君.wav"}],"segments":[{"text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"撞个正着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"对家派来的诱饵","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"眼神冷得像冰","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"你是怎么进来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我肚子上全是淤青","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"手心还在冒血","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"认定我这是为了爬床","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"演的苦肉计","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"他满眼嫌弃","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"哑巴了","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我惊恐地一抬头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"一模一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"谁派你来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"生理性的泪水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"把我甩在地上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我疼得浑身发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"费劲地爬起来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"就这么光着身子拉开门","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"往外走","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"丢我头上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我被砸懵了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"喵呜","role":"西西","type":"dialogue","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"text":"我本能地想求饶","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却发出了猫叫声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"火气更大了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"穿上衣服","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"立马给我滚","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"把衬衫套反了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"外头雷雨交加","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"睡不着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"脑子里全是我临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那个绝望的眼神","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷找到了","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.7,0],"speaking_speed":1.15},{"text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"围在他身后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒蹲下身","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"西西过来","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"往常我早就扑过去了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我又滋溜一下","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"钻进了草垛深处","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"夏辛在旁边碎碎念","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"西西以前不怕我的","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"今天也不让我抱","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒没理他","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"直接扒开草垛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"把我提溜了出来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"他不顾脏兮兮的泥水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直接把我按在怀里","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我却控制不住地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"在他怀里瑟瑟发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"这是我第一次这么怕他","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒有些心疼地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"揉揉我的头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"乖不许怕","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"话音未落","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"他就在草垛里看见了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"那件带血的脏衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那不是昨晚那个女人的吗","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"怎么会在这儿","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"夏辛看他盯着破衬衫发呆问道","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷要我扔了吗","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒惊愕地看了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"怀里的我一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"叫兽医","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"兽医很快赶到","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"检查结果让战彦寒的脸色","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"越来越难看","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"四爷","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"猫的腹部有淤青","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上有七条利器划伤的口子","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"已经发炎了","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"右前爪缝了两针","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"近期别沾水","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"兽医走后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"夏辛看战彦寒一身泥水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"伸手想接过我","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷你去洗澡换衣服","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我来抱西西","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"谁知战彦寒侧身一避","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95}],"assignments":[{"line":1,"role":"旁白","text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":2,"role":"旁白","text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":3,"role":"旁白","text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":4,"role":"旁白","text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":5,"role":"旁白","text":"撞个正着","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":6,"role":"旁白","text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":7,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":8,"role":"旁白","text":"对家派来的诱饵","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":9,"role":"旁白","text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":10,"role":"旁白","text":"眼神冷得像冰","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":11,"role":"战彦寒","text":"你是怎么进来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":12,"role":"旁白","text":"我肚子上全是淤青","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":13,"role":"旁白","text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":14,"role":"旁白","text":"手心还在冒血","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":15,"role":"旁白","text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":16,"role":"旁白","text":"认定我这是为了爬床","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":17,"role":"旁白","text":"演的苦肉计","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":18,"role":"旁白","text":"他满眼嫌弃","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":19,"role":"战彦寒","text":"哑巴了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":20,"role":"旁白","text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":21,"role":"旁白","text":"我惊恐地一抬头","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":22,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":23,"role":"旁白","text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":24,"role":"旁白","text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":25,"role":"旁白","text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":26,"role":"旁白","text":"一模一样","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":27,"role":"旁白","text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":28,"role":"战彦寒","text":"谁派你来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":29,"role":"旁白","text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":30,"role":"旁白","text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":31,"role":"旁白","text":"生理性的泪水","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":32,"role":"旁白","text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":33,"role":"旁白","text":"把我甩在地上","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":34,"role":"旁白","text":"我疼得浑身发抖","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":35,"role":"旁白","text":"费劲地爬起来","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":36,"role":"旁白","text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":37,"role":"旁白","text":"就这么光着身子拉开门","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":38,"role":"旁白","text":"往外走","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":39,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":40,"role":"旁白","text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":41,"role":"旁白","text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":42,"role":"旁白","text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":43,"role":"旁白","text":"丢我头上","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":44,"role":"旁白","text":"我被砸懵了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":45,"role":"旁白","text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":46,"role":"西西","text":"喵呜","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"line":47,"role":"旁白","text":"我本能地想求饶","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":48,"role":"旁白","text":"却发出了猫叫声","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":49,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":50,"role":"旁白","text":"火气更大了","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":51,"role":"战彦寒","text":"穿上衣服","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":52,"role":"战彦寒","text":"立马给我滚","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":53,"role":"旁白","text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":54,"role":"旁白","text":"把衬衫套反了","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":55,"role":"旁白","text":"临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":56,"role":"旁白","text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":57,"role":"旁白","text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":58,"role":"旁白","text":"外头雷雨交加","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":59,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":60,"role":"旁白","text":"睡不着","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":61,"role":"旁白","text":"脑子里全是我临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":62,"role":"旁白","text":"那个绝望的眼神","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":63,"role":"旁白","text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":64,"role":"夏辛","text":"四爷找到了","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.7,0],"speaking_speed":1.15},{"line":65,"role":"旁白","text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":66,"role":"旁白","text":"围在他身后","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":67,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒蹲下身","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":68,"role":"旁白","text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":69,"role":"战彦寒","text":"西西过来","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":70,"role":"旁白","text":"往常我早就扑过去了","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":71,"role":"旁白","text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":72,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":73,"role":"旁白","text":"我又滋溜一下","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"line":74,"role":"旁白","text":"钻进了草垛深处","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":75,"role":"旁白","text":"夏辛在旁边碎碎念","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":76,"role":"夏辛","text":"四爷","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":77,"role":"夏辛","text":"西西以前不怕我的","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":78,"role":"夏辛","text":"今天也不让我抱","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":79,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒没理他","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":80,"role":"旁白","text":"直接扒开草垛","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":81,"role":"旁白","text":"把我提溜了出来","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":82,"role":"旁白","text":"他不顾脏兮兮的泥水","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":83,"role":"旁 motion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"手心还在冒血","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"认定我这是为了爬床","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"演的苦肉计","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"他满眼嫌弃","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"哑巴了","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我惊恐地一抬头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"一模一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"谁派你来的","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"生理性的泪水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"把我甩在地上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我疼得浑身发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"费劲地爬起来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"就这么光着身子拉开门","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"往外走","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"丢我头上","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我被砸懵了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"喵呜","role":"西西","type":"dialogue","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"text":"我本能地想求饶","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却发出了猫叫声","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"火气更大了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"穿上衣服","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"立马给我滚","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"把衬衫套反了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"外头雷雨交加","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"睡不着","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"脑子里全是我临走前","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那个绝望的眼神","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷找到了","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.7,0],"speaking_speed":1.15},{"text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"围在他身后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒蹲下身","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"西西过来","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"往常我早就扑过去了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我又滋溜一下","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"text":"钻进了草垛深处","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"夏辛在旁边碎碎念","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"西西以前不怕我的","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"今天也不让我抱","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒没理他","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"直接扒开草垛","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"把我提溜了出来","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"text":"他不顾脏兮兮的泥水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"直接把我按在怀里","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"我却控制不住地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"在他怀里瑟瑟发抖","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"这是我第一次这么怕他","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"战彦寒有些心疼地","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"揉揉我的头","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"乖不许怕","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"话音未落","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"他就在草垛里看见了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"那件带血的脏衬衫","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"那不是昨晚那个女人的吗","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"怎么会在这儿","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"夏辛看他盯着破衬衫发呆问道","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷要我扔了吗","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"战彦寒惊愕地看了","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"怀里的我一眼","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"叫兽医","role":"战彦寒","type":"dialogue","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"text":"兽医很快赶到","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"检查结果让战彦寒的脸色","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"越来越难看","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"四爷","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"猫的腹部有淤青","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"身上有七条利器划伤的口子","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"已经发炎了","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"右前爪缝了两针","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"近期别沾水","role":"兽医","type":"dialogue","emotion":"严肃","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"text":"兽医走后","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"text":"夏辛看战彦寒一身泥水","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"伸手想接过我","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"四爷你去洗澡换衣服","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"我来抱西西","role":"夏辛","type":"dialogue","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"text":"谁知战彦寒侧身一避","role":"旁白","type":"narration","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95}],"assignments":[{"line":1,"role":"旁白","text":"我本是一只无忧无虑的宠物猫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":2,"role":"旁白","text":"却因嘴馋偷喝了一口主人的可乐","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":3,"role":"旁白","text":"没想竟从猫咪变成了人类","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":4,"role":"旁白","text":"还好巧不巧的被主人战彦寒","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":5,"role":"旁白","text":"撞个正着","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":6,"role":"旁白","text":"此时我裹着猫毯躺在床上","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":7,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒还以为我是哪个","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":8,"role":"旁白","text":"对家派来的诱饵","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":9,"role":"旁白","text":"二话不说掐住我的脖子","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":10,"role":"旁白","text":"眼神冷得像冰","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":11,"role":"战彦寒","text":"你是怎么进来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":12,"role":"旁白","text":"我肚子上全是淤青","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":13,"role":"旁白","text":"身上也被划得鲜血淋漓","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":14,"role":"旁白","text":"手心还在冒血","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":15,"role":"旁白","text":"可战彦寒根本不吃这一套","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":16,"role":"旁白","text":"认定我这是为了爬床","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":17,"role":"旁白","text":"演的苦肉计","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":18,"role":"旁白","text":"他满眼嫌弃","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":19,"role":"战彦寒","text":"哑巴了","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":20,"role":"旁白","text":"那声音冷得我直哆嗦","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":21,"role":"旁白","text":"我惊恐地一抬头","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":22,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒整个人都僵住了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":23,"role":"旁白","text":"不是被我的美貌惊艳","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":24,"role":"旁白","text":"而是因为我那双祖母绿的眼睛","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":25,"role":"旁白","text":"跟他走丢的那只猫","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":26,"role":"旁白","text":"一模一样","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":27,"role":"旁白","text":"但他眼底的寒意反而更重了","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":28,"role":"战彦寒","text":"谁派你来的","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":29,"role":"旁白","text":"由于缺氧我的脸涨得通红","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":30,"role":"旁白","text":"直到眼角滑下一滴","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":31,"role":"旁白","text":"生理性的泪水","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":32,"role":"旁白","text":"他才像丢垃圾一样","emotion":"厌恶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":33,"role":"旁白","text":"把我甩在地上","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":34,"role":"旁白","text":"我疼得浑身发抖","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":35,"role":"旁白","text":"费劲地爬起来","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":36,"role":"旁白","text":"我不懂人类的羞耻","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":37,"role":"旁白","text":"就这么光着身子拉开门","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":38,"role":"旁白","text":"往外走","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":39,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听到楼道里的脚步声","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":40,"role":"旁白","text":"烦躁地深吸一口气","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":41,"role":"旁白","text":"冲过来一把将我拽回去","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":42,"role":"旁白","text":"随手从衣柜扯了件衬衫","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":43,"role":"旁白","text":"丢我头上","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":44,"role":"旁白","text":"我被砸懵了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":45,"role":"旁白","text":"委屈得眼泪啪嗒直掉","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":46,"role":"西西","text":"喵呜","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.8},{"line":47,"role":"旁白","text":"我本能地想求饶","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":48,"role":"旁白","text":"却发出了猫叫声","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":49,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒听我学猫叫","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":50,"role":"旁白","text":"火气更大了","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":51,"role":"战彦寒","text":"穿上衣服","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":52,"role":"战彦寒","text":"立马给我滚","emotion":"愤怒","emotion_vector":[0,0.7,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":53,"role":"旁白","text":"我抽噎着笨拙地","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":54,"role":"旁白","text":"把衬衫套反了","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":55,"role":"旁白","text":"临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":56,"role":"旁白","text":"我依依不舍地看了他一眼","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":57,"role":"旁白","text":"却只见他满脸阴沉","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":58,"role":"旁白","text":"外头雷雨交加","emotion":"压抑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0.3,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":59,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒躺在床上翻来覆去","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":60,"role":"旁白","text":"睡不着","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":61,"role":"旁白","text":"脑子里全是我临走前","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":62,"role":"旁白","text":"那个绝望的眼神","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":63,"role":"旁白","text":"天一亮门外就传来了动静","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":64,"role":"夏辛","text":"四爷找到了","emotion":"惊喜","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.7,0],"speaking_speed":1.15},{"line":65,"role":"旁白","text":"十几个保镖撑着黑伞","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":66,"role":"旁白","text":"围在他身后","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":67,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒蹲下身","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":68,"role":"旁白","text":"冲着躲在草丛里的我拍手","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":69,"role":"战彦寒","text":"西西过来","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":70,"role":"旁白","text":"往常我早就扑过去了","emotion":"低落","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":71,"role":"旁白","text":"可这次我吓得往后缩","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":72,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒脸色一沉","emotion":"烦躁","emotion_vector":[0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":73,"role":"旁白","text":"我又滋溜一下","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.1},{"line":74,"role":"旁白","text":"钻进了草垛深处","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":75,"role":"旁白","text":"夏辛在旁边碎碎念","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":76,"role":"夏辛","text":"四爷","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":77,"role":"夏辛","text":"西西以前不怕我的","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":78,"role":"夏辛","text":"今天也不让我抱","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":79,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒没理他","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":80,"role":"旁白","text":"直接扒开草垛","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":81,"role":"旁白","text":"把我提溜了出来","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":1.05},{"line":82,"role":"旁白","text":"他不顾脏兮兮的泥水","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":83,"role":"旁白","text":"直接把我按在怀里","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":84,"role":"旁白","text":"我却控制不住地","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":85,"role":"旁白","text":"在他怀里瑟瑟发抖","emotion":"惧怕","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":86,"role":"旁白","text":"这是我第一次这么怕他","emotion":"哀伤","emotion_vector":[0,0,0.4,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":87,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒有些心疼地","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":88,"role":"旁白","text":"揉揉我的头","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.3,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":89,"role":"战彦寒","text":"乖不许怕","emotion":"温和","emotion_vector":[0.5,0,0,0,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":90,"role":"旁白","text":"话音未落","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":0.9},{"line":91,"role":"旁白","text":"他就在草垛里看见了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":92,"role":"旁白","text":"那件带血的脏衬衫","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":93,"role":"旁白","text":"那不是昨晚那个女人的吗","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":94,"role":"旁白","text":"怎么会在这儿","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":95,"role":"旁白","text":"夏辛看他盯着破衬衫发呆问道","emotion":"平静","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0.3],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":96,"role":"夏辛","text":"四爷要我扔了吗","emotion":"疑惑","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.4,0],"speaking_speed":1.0},{"line":97,"role":"旁白","text":"战彦寒惊愕地看了","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":98,"role":"旁白","text":"怀里的我一眼","emotion":"惊讶","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0,0,0,0.5,0],"speaking_speed":0.95},{"line":99,"role":"战彦寒","text":"叫兽医","emotion":"紧张","emotion_vector":[0,0,0,0.5,0,0,0,0],"speaking_speed":0.85},{"line":100,"role":"旁白","text":"兽医很快赶到","emotion":"平静","emotion_
